reply.text: My self control just submitted a resignation letter

messages.text: your self control saw the handbag and folded huh
it clocked out the second that bag entered frame
be honest, u want me or the purse 👀
both, but the purse is negotiating harder
facts, she got standards and a chain
she also has better posture than me right now
bag sitting pretty, u sitting jealous
you are persistent, i will give that
i did, your mirror won with one photo
mirror been my biggest hater and fan
same, mine roasts me daily for free
at least mine helps with thirst traps
mine just shows me angles i never asked for
sounds like u need my mirror’s manager
let me take you out this week
